zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Horne於大約1434年出生在英國英格蘭肯特沃爾坦時，她的父親Henry Horne35歲，母親Mary Ferress30歲。她於1451年與Sir William Haute在英國英格蘭肯特比曉普斯同結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年7月2日在英國肯特比曉普斯布恩享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Horne于大约1434年出生在英国英格兰肯特沃爾坦时，她的父亲Henry Horne35岁，母亲Mary Ferress30岁。她于1451年与Sir William Haute在英国英格兰肯特比曉普斯同结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年7月2日在英国肯特比曉普斯布恩享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Horne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, German, and Dutch: variant of   Horn  .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads mostly so named from the dative singular of horn (see Horn ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Horne was born about 1434, in Waltham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Horne, was 35 and her mother, Mary Ferress, was 30. She married Sir William Haute in 1451, in Bishopstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 2 July 1497, in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Horne est née environ 1434, à Waltham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Horne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mary Ferress, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Haute en 1451, à Bishopstone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 juillet 1497, à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Horne um 1434 in Waltham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Horne 35 und ihre Mutter Mary Ferress 30. Sie hat 1451 in Bishopstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir William Haute geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Juli 1497 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Horne è nata il circa 1434 nel Waltham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Horne, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Mary Ferress, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Haute nel 1451, nel Bishopstone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 2 luglio 1497, nel Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Horneが約1434年にイギリスイギリスケントワルサムで生まれた時，父Henry Horneは35歳，母Mary Ferressは30歳であった。1451年にイギリスイギリスケントビショプストーンでSir William Hauteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年7月2日にイギリスケントビショプスボウルンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Horne(이)가 대략 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Horne(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Ferress(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비숍스톤에서 Sir William Haute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 7월 2일 영국 켄트 비숍스번에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Horne nasceu aproximadamente 1434, em Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Horne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ferress, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Haute em 1451, em Bishopstone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de julho de 1497, em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Horne родилась около 1434 г. в местности валтам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Horne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ferress, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Haute в 1451 г. в местности бишопстоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 2 июля 1497 г. в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Horne nació aproximadamente 1434, en Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Horne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mary Ferress, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir William Haute en 1451, en Bishopstone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 2 de julio de 1497, en Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
